name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionValuePrecisions
summary: The value precisions for the dimensions.

enum_values.name: Whole
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest whole (1).

enum_values.name: OnePerTwo
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest half (1/2).

enum_values.name: OnePerThree
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest third (1/3).

enum_values.name: OnePerFour
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest fourth (1/4).

enum_values.name: OnePerEight
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest eighth (1/8).

enum_values.name: OnePerSixteen
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest sixteenth (1/16).

enum_values.name: OnePerThirtytwo
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to the nearest thirtysecond (1/32).

enum_values.name: OnePerTen
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to one decimal (1/10).

enum_values.name: OnePerHundred
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to two decimals (1/100).

enum_values.name: OnePerThousand
enum_values.summary: The value is rounded to three decimals (1/1000).
